caption: A close-up shot features a man with grey hair and glasses, looking directly toward the camera with a slight smile. He is positioned against a neutral, grey background. The video layout includes a graphic banner at the bottom of the screen. The banner contains the text "PLUS POLITICS" in a small purple box, followed by the larger headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". In the lower section of the first frame, the text "SUBSCRIBE" and the URL "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA LIFESTYLE" are visible. Subsequent frames show the text "FOLLOW US" in the bottom left, alongside social media icons for Instagram, Facebook, and LinkedIn, and the handle "PLUSTVAFRICA". The logo for "plustv" appears in the upper left corner of each frame. Across the sequence, the man remains stationary and maintains his expression, while the on-screen text in the bottom banner shifts slightly.
